zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Norton於1609年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，他的父親Robert Norton34歲，母親Ann Hare29歲。他於1631年5月5日與Grace Wells在英國英格蘭貝德福爾雪登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文吉爾福特享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Norton was born in 1609, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Norton, was 34 and his mother, Ann Hare, was 29. He married Grace Wells on 5 May 1631, in Shelton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1648, in Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 39.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Norton(이)가 1609년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Norton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Hare(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1631년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 셸턴에서 Grace Wells(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 길퍼드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Norton родился в 1609 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Norton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Hare, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Wells 5 мая 1631 г. в местности шелтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1648 г. в местности гуилфорд, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Norton nació en 1609, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Norton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Ann Hare, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Grace Wells el 5 de mayo de 1631, en Shelton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1648, en Guilford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 39 años.
